subcodes.title: Words to Juliet Thompson et al, spoken on 1909-07-10
subcodes.first_line: At the time of prayer one must hold in one's mind some object. Then he must turn his face and direct his mind to this picture.
subcodes.subjects: @Mary Magdalene, @resurrection of Christ, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @idolatry, @the state of prayer; dynamics of prayer, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
